overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a player character exploring a futuristic neon-lit urban environment at night. The sequence shows ascending stairs, walking through covered pedestrian corridors, and traversing elevated walkways with panoramic views of the cyberpunk cityscape featuring holographic advertisements and towering glass structures.

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs while passing pedestrians descending in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: descending stairs wearing casual futuristic clothing with red leg accents

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal edges ascending between buildings
silver metal handrail with glass panels running along left side of stairs
silver metal handrail with glass panels running along right side of stairs
cyan neon light strips running vertically along building edges
large digital advertisement showing a woman's face in close-up

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person perspective ascending a concrete stairway at night. Cyan neon lights illuminate the sides of the stairwell while other pedestrians walk down. A large digital billboard is visible on the right wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with reflective flooring

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters covered neon-lit pedestrian corridor with reflective floor

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered walkway passing by digital advertisements and potted plants

entered.detail: rectangular frame structure outlined with bright cyan neon lights marking the corridor entrance
highly polished dark floor reflecting the neon lights and ceiling displays
large digital display mounted on the ceiling showing colorful advertisements
rectangular concrete planter containing small trees and greenery
modern building exterior with glass windows and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered pedestrian corridor with highly reflective flooring that mirrors the cyan neon lights and ceiling displays. The space features modern glass building facades and concrete planters with greenery.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking city street

events.description: exits covered corridor onto open elevated walkway with view of multi-lane street below

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated walkway with glass railings, observing the street traffic below

entered.detail: wide pedestrian bridge with glass railings extending over the city street
transparent glass safety barrier along the edge of the elevated walkway
multi-lane road visible below with sparse vehicle traffic moving through the city
large vertical red billboard displaying white oni mask graphics with Japanese text
tall modern skyscraper with illuminated glass windows and structural framework

segments.scene_description: The player emerges onto an open elevated walkway with glass railings overlooking a multi-lane street below. A prominent red neon billboard with oni mask graphics dominates the right side while modern glass towers rise on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated observation overlook with city views

events.description: stops walking to look down at street traffic and observe the surrounding cityscape
camera tilts upward to reveal clear night sky with visible full moon above skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: standing at the overlook, looking down at the street below and then up at the moon and surrounding towers

notable_agents.action: sitting on a bench near the overlook edge, looking out at the city

entered.detail: bright full moon visible in the clear night sky between skyscrapers
tall building with exposed structural framework and illuminated windows
building facade with alternating illuminated yellow and dark square patterns

segments.scene_description: The player stops at an elevated overlook to observe the city, looking down at the street traffic below and then tilting the camera up to reveal the moon between the skyscrapers. An NPC sits on a nearby bench. The red oni mask billboard is now much closer on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: glass-enclosed elevated walkway with panoramic city views

events.description: resumes walking along glass-floor section of the elevated walkway, looking down at traffic below

agents.ego_description: walking along a glass-enclosed section of the walkway, observing the cityscape and passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera wearing a white shirt and dark pants

entered.detail: transparent glass panels in the walkway floor showing the street multiple stories below
large red neon sign reading 'LUXURY ELECTRONICS' with Japanese characters underneath
dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers and high-rise buildings extending into the distance

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a section of the elevated walkway with transparent glass flooring, providing a view straight down to the street below. The camera passes by the large red 'LUXURY ELECTRONICS' sign and takes in panoramic views of the dense cyberpunk cityscape with its towering illuminated buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a confined neon stairwell into a vast, open panoramic view of a futuristic cityscape. It begins by ascending a concrete stairway illuminated by cyan neon lights and digital billboards, moving past descending pedestrians. As the camera enters a covered pedestrian corridor, the environment shifts to a sleek space of reflective flooring and glass facades before emerging onto an open elevated walkway with glass railings. The scene then expands to an overlook where the camera tilts from the street traffic below up toward the moon framed by skyscrapers, passing a prominent red oni mask billboard and a seated NPC. Finally, the movement continues across transparent glass flooring, gliding past a large Luxury Electronics sign to reveal a dense, illuminated skyline of towering buildings.
